name: Mosaic of The Pharaohs
short_description: Mosaic of The Pharaohs is a picross/minesweeper hybrid featuring a single ENORMOUS puzzle inspired by Egyptology
detailed_description:
🧩Mosaic of the Pharaohs is digital cross-stitch. A meditative game about completing a single enormous 60,000+ piece grid puzzle.

💣 If you know how to play minesweeper, you already know how to play a mosaic puzzle! The numbered clues (0-9) indicate how many light tiles must be placed within 1 square of the clue.

🖼️ Piece together a breathtaking 60,000-tile collage of the wonders of Ancient Egypt, uncovering nearly 100 fascinating facts about its myths, gods, monuments, explorers and more.

🎶 Whether you're engrossed in your favourite podcasts or listening to your favourite tunes, Mosaic of The Pharaohs serves as the perfect backdrop to enhance your experience. Or choose from the soothing built-in egyptian soundtrack.

⏳ Dozens of Hours of Addictive Gameplay: Get ready to lose yourself in hours of simple, calming but addictive puzzle-solving, with 99 achievements to collect!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil
